name: Речник английски — значения (ядро)
source: Уикиречник през kaikki.org (CC BY-SA) + честотен списък

entries.value: "you" (местоимение, английски): The people spoken, or written to, as an object.
"the" (наречие, английски): With a comparative or with more and a verb phrase, establishes a correlation with one or more other such comparatives.
"to" (съюз, английски): In order to.
"'s" (глагол, английски): Contraction of is.
"it" (местоимение, английски): The third-person singular neuter personal pronoun used to refer to an inanimate object, abstract entity, or non-human living thing.
"and" (съюз, английски): As a coordinating conjunction; expressing two elements to be taken together or in addition to each other.
"that" (съюз, английски): Introducing a clause that is the object of a verb, especially a reporting verb or verb expressing belief, knowledge, perception, etc.
"'t" (местоимение, английски): Contraction of that.
"of" (предлог, английски): Expressing distance or motion.
"is" (глагол, английски): Used in phrases with existential there (also here and where) when the semantic subject is plural.
"in" (предлог, английски): Used to indicate location, inclusion, or position within spatial, temporal or abstract limits.
"what" (местоимение, английски): Which thing, event, circumstance, etc.: used in asking for the specification of an identity, quantity, quality, etc.
"we" (местоимение, английски): Two or more people including or consisting of the speaker(s)/writer(s).
"me" (съществително, английски): Initialism of master of engineering.
"this" (наречие, английски): To the degree or extent indicated.
"he" (местоимение, английски): A person who identifies as male, or animal already known or implied.
"for" (съюз, английски): Because.
"my" (междуметие, английски): Used to express surprise, shock or amazement.
"on" (прилагателно, английски): In the state of being active, functioning or operating.
"have" (глагол, английски): To possess, own.
"do" (глагол, английски): A syntactic marker.
"was" (глагол, английски): Used in phrases with existential there when the semantic subject is (usually third-person) plural.
"'m" (глагол, английски): Am, used especially in I'm.
"no" (прилагателно, английски): Initialism of normally open.
"not" (наречие, английски): Negates the meaning of the modified verb.
"be" (глагол, английски): As an auxiliary verb:
"are" (съществително, английски): An accepted (but deprecated and rarely used) metric unit of area equal to 100 square metres, or a former unit of approximately the same e…

"know" (глагол, английски): To perceive the truth or factuality of; to be certain of; to be certain that.
"can" (глагол, английски): To know how to.
"with" (предлог, английски): Against.
"but" (предлог, английски): Apart from, except (for), excluding.
"all" (местоимение, английски): Everything.
"so" (съюз, английски): As a result; for that reason; therefore; because of this; due to this.
"just" (прилагателно, английски): Factually right, correct; factual.
"there" (наречие, английски): In or at a place or location (stated, implied or otherwise indicated) that is perceived to be away from, or at a relative distance from, …

"they" (местоимение, английски): A group of entities previously mentioned.
"like" (глагол, английски): To enjoy, be pleased by; favor; be in favor of.
"'ll" (глагол, английски): Will, shall (marking the future tense or other modal sense).
"get" (глагол, английски): To obtain; to acquire.
"she" (местоимение, английски): The female (typically) person or animal previously mentioned or implied.
"go" (съществително, английски): Initialism of graphene oxide.

"good" (прилагателно, английски): Of a person or an animal:

"okay" (съществително, английски): Alternative spelling of OK.

"them" (местоимение, английски): Those ones.
"where" (наречие, английски): In, at or to what place.

"our" (глагол, английски): Misspelling of are.
"gonna" (глагол, английски): A modal used to express a future action that is being planned or prepared for in the present.
